title: Vulcan Punishments+
description: A Vulcan AntiCheat Addon that allows you to have different punishments depending on how many times the player has been punished by Vulcan.
body:
![Vulcan Punishments+ Logo](https://plugindocs.ray-y.co.uk/u/vpp.webp)

# Vulcan Punishments+ 

An open source **Vulcan Anticheat** addon enhancing the punishment system.

Vulcan Punishments+ allows you to replace the default single punishment behaviour (kicking the player by default) from Vulcan to a tiered system, allowing you to punish the player depending on how many times they've been suspected of cheating.

## Why Vulcan Punishments+?
- **Open source**: View all code, contribute new features and know what the plugin is doing.
- **Simple**: Vulcan Punishments+ is designed for you to easily configure and use without being a chore or in the way
- **Player retention**: Stop losing legit players because they were punished because of false flags or temporary lag by using less harsh punishments or ignore the first couple of instances.


## Simple but powerful configuration

An example on how you can configure Vulcan Punishments+ to tailor to your server.
```
punishment-1:
  command: ignore
punishment-2:
  command: warn %player% Cheat Detection
punishment-3:
  commands:
    1: kick %player% Cheat Detection
    2: warn %player% Cheat Detection
    3: 
punishment-4:
  command: tempban %player% 2d Cheat Detection
punishment-5:
  command: ban %player% Cheat Detection
etc..
```

## Requirements:
- Vulcan Anticheat
- Permission plugin, such as Luckperms.

## Need help getting started?
- Check out our detailed documentation: [https://plugindocs.ray-y.co.uk/vulcanpunishmentsplus](https://plugindocs.ray-y.co.uk/vulcanpunishmentsplus)
- Ask for support on our discord server: https://discord.com/invite/EshbnCjhfc

Vulcan Punishments+ leverages the Vulcan Anticheat API, making it easy to use and configure.
